evidence: Aerodynamic resonates most with ontological.material (physical shape), resonance.essential (core of smoothness), and lawfulness.predictable (following fluid dynamics laws). Scores are reduced elsewhere to prioritize these central connections and adhere to PRP.rough's opposition.

Value.aesthetic (4) as smooth, bright surfaces are visually appealing. Scores for catalytic (3) and generative (2) reflect how smoothness can trigger brightness. Predictable (3) ties to the expected relationship between smoothness and light reflection.
